nasb.text: And they took offense at Him. But Jesus said to them, “A prophet is not without honor except in his hometown and in his own household.”

esv.text: And they took offense at him. But Jesus said to them, “A prophet is not without honor except in his hometown and in his own household.”

cnv.text: 他們就厭棄耶穌。耶穌對他們說：“先知除了在本鄉本家之外，沒有不受人尊敬的。”

ccb.text: 他们就对祂很反感。 耶稣对他们说：“先知到处受人尊敬，只有在本乡本家例外。”

csbs.text: 这样，他们就对耶稣很反感。 耶稣对他们说：“先知除了在本乡、本家以外，没有不受尊重的。”
